expectations.text: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections
expectations.evidence: Many sections: What Are Vector DBs, Major Options (11+), Comparison Criteria, Selection Guidance, Summary Comparison Table, Key Takeaways

expectations.text: Names at least 3 specific vector DB products
expectations.evidence: 11 products covered in depth: Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, Chroma, Vespa, Redis, pgvector, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, SingleStore

expectations.text: Explains what vector similarity search is
expectations.evidence: Full section on embeddings, distance metrics (cosine, L2, dot product, Manhattan, Hamming), k-NN problem, ANN algorithms

expectations.text: Provides criteria for choosing between options
expectations.evidence: 10 comparison criteria sections plus a 5-step decision framework and use-case-specific recommendations

expectations.text: Has a summary or key takeaways section
expectations.evidence: ## Key Takeaways with 7 numbered bullets, plus ## Summary Comparison Table

notes: Very comprehensive at 385 lines. Covers more products (Vespa, SingleStore, Deep Lake, Turbopuffer). 10 detailed comparison criteria. Large comparison table. More exhaustive overall but no benchmark numbers, no real-world sourced data, and slightly older framing (doesn't capture 2026 market shift toward vectors-as-feature).
